Localization.Description: Persistence on a host was gained by changing a system service file. Attackers can create or modify systemd services to repeatedly execute malicious payloads.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Persistence was possible gained by changing system service file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}.
Persistence was possible gained by creating system service file {object.fullpath} and starting service {datafield7} on host {event_src.host}.
User {subject.account.name} possible gained persistence by changing system service file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}.
User {subject.account.name} possible gained persistence by creating system service file {object.fullpath} and starting service {datafield7} on host {event_src.host}.
